src/main/resources/archetype-resources/c.general_idea: Update Spring Boot logging configuration property to use the new 'file.name' syntax required in Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/resources/archetype-resources/c.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removed the 'logging.file' property in favor of 'logging.file.name' and 'logging.file.path'; using the old property results in a configuration warning or failure to apply the setting.
